name: build-loop
description: Orchestrated 5-phase development loop (Assess → Plan → Execute → Review → Iterate) plus optional Learn phase. Review combines critic, validate, optimize, fact-check, simplify, and report as ordered sub-steps. Includes NavGator / claude-code-debugger / logging-tracer bridges with standalone fallbacks (cherry-pick from companion tools without coupling). Opus 4.7 orchestrator, Sonnet execution, Haiku pattern-matching.
